Description.Name: Imposter
Description.Details: Mada Seloc does not talk much about where he came from. The way he joined your company is not public knowledge but he certainly is skilled. When asked about his past, he mentions only that he was raised in the Word of Blake's theology and that he has dedicated himself fully to Blake's vision. He's a hell of a pilot though, a crack shot and tough as nails to boot, so the trade it took to get him was definitely worthwhile. He does good work in battle and serves without complaint outside of it and that's all you can really ask for from a pilot. Still, you get the impression he's always watching you and the crew. And, more ominously, that he's waiting for something to happen. SPECIAL AFFINITY WITH ARCHANGELS, LEGACIES, AND PRETAS CHECK PASSIVE ABILITIES IN COMBAT FOR A UNIQUE SURPRISE
